title: taraxacum oreinicola
intro: Taraxacum oreinicola, also known as the Oreina dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum oreinicola include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum oreinicola can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
